mapper.update: MERGE INTO BUDGET_DETAIL D USING DUAL ON ( D.BGT_M_CD = #{bgtMCd} AND D.BGT_ITM_NM = #{detail.bgtItmNm} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET D.BGT_AMT = D.BGT_AMT + #{detail.bgtAmt} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BGT_CD , BGT_M_CD , BGT_ITM_NM , BGT_AMT , BGT_EXCN , BGT_DETAIL_STTS ) VALUES ( SEQ_BGT_CD.NEXTVAL , #{bgtMCd} , #{detail.bgtItmNm} , #{detail.bgtAmt} , 0 , '정상' )
mapper.select: SELECT EMP_ID , EMP_NM , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_STTS = 'Y' AND ( EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT M.BGT_M_CD , M.DEPT_CD , CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '999' THEN '사내 동호회' ELSE FN_GET_DEPT_NM(M.DEPT_CD) END AS DEPT_NM , M.BGT_YR , D.BGT_CD , D.BGT_ITM_NM , D.BGT_AMT , D.BGT_EXCN , D.BGT_DETAIL_STTS , M.BGT_STTS FROM BUDGET_MASTER M JOIN BUDGET_DETAIL D ON M.BGT_M_CD = D.BGT_M_CD WHERE M.BGT_YR = #{yearFilter} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(M.DEPT_CD) ASC, D.BGT_ITM_NM ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '999' THEN '사내 동호회' ELSE FN_GET_DEPT_NM(M.DEPT_CD) END AS "team",
ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(D.BGT_AMT) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(D.BGT_EXCN) / SUM(D.BGT_AMT)) * 100 END, 1) AS "value",
SUM(D.BGT_EXCN) AS "usedAmt", SUM(D.BGT_AMT) AS "totAmt"
FROM BUDGET_MASTER M JOIN BUDGET_DETAIL D ON M.BGT_M_CD = D.BGT_M_CD WHERE M.BGT_YR = #{year} GROUP BY M.DEPT_CD ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(M.DEPT_CD) ASC

SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM L.BGT_CHG_DT) || '월' AS "month", SUM(CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '1' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '지출' THEN L.BGT_CHG_AMT WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '1' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '반려복구' THEN -L.BGT_CHG_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS "개발1팀",
SUM(CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '2' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '지출' THEN L.BGT_CHG_AMT WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '2' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '반려복구' THEN -L.BGT_CHG_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS "개발2팀",
SUM(CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '3' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '지출' THEN L.BGT_CHG_AMT WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '3' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '반려복구' THEN -L.BGT_CHG_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS "개발3팀",
SUM(CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '4' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '지출' THEN L.BGT_CHG_AMT WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '4' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '반려복구' THEN -L.BGT_CHG_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS "영업팀",
SUM(CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '5' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '지출' THEN L.BGT_CHG_AMT WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '5' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '반려복구' THEN -L.BGT_CHG_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS "경영지원팀",
SUM(CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '999' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '지출' THEN L.BGT_CHG_AMT WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '999' AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = '반려복구' THEN -L.BGT_CHG_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS "사내 동호회"
FROM BUDGET_LOG L INNER JOIN BUDGET_MASTER M ON L.BGT_M_CD = M.BGT_M_CD WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM L.BGT_CHG_DT) = #{year} AND L.BGT_CHG_SE IN ('지출', '반려복구') GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM L.BGT_CHG_DT) ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM L.BGT_CHG_DT)

SELECT L.LOG_NO , L.BGT_CHG_DT , CASE WHEN M.DEPT_CD = '999' THEN '사내 동호회' ELSE D.DEPT_NM END AS deptNM
-- 비목명이 null이면 '-' 또는 '정보없음'으로 표시 , NVL(BD.BGT_ITM_NM, '-') AS BGT_ITM_NM
, L.BGT_CHG_SE , L.BGT_CHG_AMT , L.BGT_CHG_RSN , E.EMP_NM , L.APRV_NO , A.APRV_TTL FROM BUDGET_LOG L JOIN BUDGET_MASTER M ON L.BGT_M_CD = M.BGT_M_CD
-- 여기를 LEFT OUTER JOIN으로 바꿔야 null 데이터도 보임 LEFT OUTER JOIN BUDGET_DETAIL BD ON L.BGT_CD = BD.BGT_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON L.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN APPROVAL A ON L.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO WHERE 1 = 1
AND M.BGT_YR = #{bgtYr}
AND M.BGT_YR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
AND M.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
AND L.BGT_CHG_SE = #{bgtChgSe}
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND L.BGT_CHG_RSN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.BGT_CHG_RSN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY L.BGT_CHG_DT DESC, L.LOG_NO DESC

SELECT NVL(SUM(D.BGT_AMT), 0) AS "bgtAmt", NVL(SUM(D.BGT_EXCN), 0) AS "bgtExcn" FROM BUDGET_MASTER M INNER JOIN BUDGET_DETAIL D ON M.BGT_M_CD = D.BGT_M_CD WHERE M.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND M.BGT_YR = #{currentYear}
